holdings.name: Hindustan Unilever
holdings.description: India's largest FMCG company. Dove, Surf Excel, Rin, Axe, Lifebuoy, Lakme — 50+ household brands. 4M retail touchpoints, 600M+ consumers reached. Premiumisation (Beauty & Wellbeing) driving margin expansion in urban markets.

holdings.name: ITC Limited
holdings.description: India's most diversified consumer company. Cigarettes (monopoly, 80%+ share), Aashirvaad Atta, Yippee Noodles, Sunfeast biscuits, Savlon hygiene. Hotels (ITC Grand, Sheraton) and IT subsidiary (ITC Infotech) add diversification. Demerger of hotels value-unlock expected.

holdings.name: Titan Company
holdings.description: Tanishq (India's most trusted jewellery brand), Titan watches, Fastrack accessories, ALDO, CaratLane (e-jewellery). ₹50,000+ Cr jewellery revenue growing 20%+. Lab-grown diamond category expansion. Premiumisation across India's wedding and gifting occasions.

holdings.name: Trent Limited
holdings.description: Zudio (India's fastest growing apparel brand, ₹499 jeans) and Westside premium stores. 600+ Zudio stores, targeting 2,000+. ABFRL competition intensifying but Trent's cost model, private label focus and Tata brand trust create durable advantage.

holdings.name: Avenue Supermarts (D-Mart)
holdings.description: India's most profitable retailer per sq ft. 350+ warehouse-style stores in 15 states. EDLP (Everyday Low Price) model relies on owned stores (no rent) and direct-from-manufacturer buying. D-Mart Ready (online) scaling selectively in Mumbai.

holdings.name: Nestle India
holdings.description: Maggi, KitKat, Munch, Nescafe, Milkmaid — 60+ year legacy in Indian households. Premium nutrition (NAN infant formula, Milo) growing fast. Category development leader. A global premium allocates 3-4% of Indian sales back to R&D localisation.
